title: chrysogonum virginianum var. australe
intro: Chrysogonum virginianum var. australe, also known as the greenflower violet or australe greenflower, is a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the southeastern United States and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains flavonoids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and may help to reduce stress and anxiety, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Chrysogonum virginianum var. australe include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
